title: actor_cache: concurrent fetches for same actor URI (stampede)
description: In src/actor_cache.rs get_public_key, the cache lock is dropped between the read check and the remote fetch (lines 34-39 vs 65-85). Two concurrent inbox requests with the same keyId will both miss the cache, both fetch the remote actor document, and both insert into the cache. Under high load or a thundering herd (e.g. a popular remote server sending many activities simultaneously), this produces N redundant outbound HTTP requests to the same actor URI. Fix: use a per-actor in-flight deduplication (e.g. tokio::sync::OnceCell keyed by URI, or a separate pending map) to coalesce concurrent fetches.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
